case_title: BENJAMIN BUTLER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BUTLER, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN BUTLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE. SERVED JUN-18-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2024 - CONTINUED TO OCT-02-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 AS PLAINTIFF WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN BUTLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTLER, BENJAMIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
